name: icon-design
description: Design, refine, validate, and package production-ready icons and compact brand marks.

interface.longDescription: A vector-first workflow for designing, auditing, refining, and exporting icons, favicons, app icons, and compact brand marks.
defaultPrompt: Design an original icon and verify it at native sizes.
Refine this SVG and package a complete brand suite.
Audit this icon family for clarity and consistency.
